prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/306-doc.pages in Pages. Add a header to the document containing the text 'KinBench 306'. (Hover near the top of the page; the three header text fields will appear. Type into one.) Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'pages add_header_footer ~/Desktop/kinbench/306-doc.pages "KinBench 306" header'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/306-header-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
